8768B3DC4C0100FF843996B46B556BCD: A configurable EMP Volume Hazard that slows Rocket Racing Vehicles.
5A923A3F4827BBEC388A06AA8C54398F: The collision shape of the EMP Volume Hazard.
C3E2D6F047E06C0D83C71E89D3F54B94: Triggers the specified channel when the jelly is triggered.

UserOptionDefinition.FortDelMar_Jelly_BP_C.bEnabledAtGameStar: Determines if this device is enabled by default. While enabled, this slows Rocket Racing Vehicles. While disabled, the device is invisible during a game, and partially visible while editing.
UserOptionDefinition.FortDelMar_Jelly_BP_C.Disable.Descriptio: Disable this device. While disabled, this has no effect.
UserOptionDefinition.FortDelMar_Jelly_BP_C.Enable.Description: Enable this device. While enabled, this slows Rocket Racing Vehicles.
UserOptionDefinition.FortDelMar_Jelly_BP_C.OnEMPHazardTrigger: Fires when a Rocket Racing Vehicle triggers this device.
